title: FYI ГўВЂВ” August 2023
body_text:
FYI ГўВЂВ” August 2023
FYI ГўВ”ВЂ August 2023
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
AFT Volume
Introduction to AFT Part
Entire Part
We replaced all ГўВЂВњsecure siteГўВЂВќ references with ГўВЂВњClient CentreГўВЂВќ.
Section 2.1, Definitions
We added new terms.
Section 5.1, Overview of Enrolling in the AFT Service
We revised the information in Step 8 to provide more clarity.
Document Library
Status
Financial Institution Transaction Limit Modification Request ГўВЂВ” Electronic Bill Payments System
2424
We updated the forwarding instructions for Manitoba, Alberta, and Saskatchewan credit unions. Credit unions in these provinces should forward the completed form directly to Central 1 as an attachment to a ServiceNow ticket or via email instead of to their provincial central.
Revised
Biller Transaction Limit Modification Request ГўВЂВ” Electronic Bill Payments System
9116
We updated the forwarding instructions for Manitoba, Alberta, and Saskatchewan credit unions. Credit unions in these provinces should forward the completed form directly to Central 1 as an attachment to a ServiceNow ticket or via email instead of to their provincial central.
Revised
Transaction and Charge Codes
3667
We made a documentation correction to the OF code ГўВЂВ“ it should be ГўВЂВњ43ГўВЂВќ.
Revised
Cheque Return File Specifications
6280
We clarified that the file name length has a limit of 15 characters (excluding the extension), and we provided references to the QREC, DCPA, and QCPA files in the Detail Record descriptions where applicable.
Revised
DCPA and QCPA Qualified Debit Clearing Items File Specifications ГўВЂВ“ CAD and USD Cheques (All Regions Except BC and Atlantic)
9528
We clarified the description for Data Element 12 in the ГўВЂВњBГўВЂВќ Record, indicating that this field is zero-filled in the DCPA file, but that the QCPA file can contain 0065 or any other transaction codes.
Revised
Questions
Central 1, Client Support Services, phone
1-888-889-7878
, Option 1, email
support@central1.com
.
